Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 2}-chan, how do you do?[n]{f 1 5 0}Come swing by the store some time to say hello, okay?[n]{f 1 5 0}Best regards.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I have this number saved on my phone, but I can't seem to recall who you are.[n]{f 1 5 0}I bet I'll remember right away once I see your face, so drop by the store.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}from the bookstore[n]texting is hard are you[n]getting this im waiting at[n]the shop for[n]you[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A {f 1 3 154} for {f 4 2}-chan![n]{f 1 5 0}I tried to use emojis {f 1 3 155}{f 1 3 155} Isn't that rad? Totally gnarly.[n]{f 1 5 0}I'll teach you how to use them, too, so come by the shop. {f 1 3 157}{f 1 3 158}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I miss your cute little face, {f 4 2}-chan {f 1 3 138}[n]This old man doesn't have much longer to live, so come visit me soon, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned how to do[n]capital letters Are you getting these Anyway[n]come visit us at[n]the shop[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}How do you do, {f 4 2}-chan?[n]{f 1 5 0}When I send you a {f 1 3 153} like this, it reminds me of the time I used to write love letters to Mitsuko-chan. {f 1 3 132}[n]Come visit us when you have time. We'll always welcome you with open arms. {f 1 3 137}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hello, {f 4 2}-chan.[n]{f 1 5 0}I'm getting better at sending messages. It's because I practiced with you.[n]{f 1 5 0}Bunkichi is feeling much better now. {f 1 3 137} Thank you for everything.[n]{f 1 5 0}Come visit us soon. {f 1 3 137}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You've helped us so much.[n]{f 1 5 0}There is something I would like to tell you, so please come to the shop at your earliest convenience.[n]{f 1 5 0}We await your arrival.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}How have you been?[n]{f 1 5 0}Come swing by the shop to say hello, will you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You see, lately, my wife has been saying that she wants to see {f 4 2}-chan.[n]{f 1 1}
